secondsBetweenClips.title: Pause between clips (seconds)
secondsBetweenClips.description: How long to wait after the four-second fade finishes before the next clip starts. The transition buffer is automatic, so a setting of 60 seconds produces a 64-second total gap.

clipCount.title: Clips to fetch per refresh
clipCount.description: How many of your most recent Twitch clips to pull into the rotation pool at once.

muted.title: Mute clip audio
muted.description: Disable clip audio. Leave this off to play the clip's original sound in OBS, Meld, or Streamlabs.
